block_or_reference: template-only fork or testnet block, token ID, collection ID, marketplace/indexer source, or transcript reference
command_or_source_system: template-only marketplace/indexer transcript, OpenSea/Reservoir/Blur/Manifold source, collector tool, event replay command, or operator transcript
redaction_statement: Template only; no raw logs, credentials, signing material, private URLs, marketplace credentials, indexer credentials, or unreleased drop payloads are present.
template_notice: Template only. This file is not completion evidence and does not mark public beta or production ready.
operator_notes: Replace this template with reviewed fork/testnet marketplace and indexer evidence covering contract metadata, token metadata refresh, animation rendering, royalty display, transfer/listing/sale or simulated sale path, event replay, cache invalidation, platform results, redaction status, and reviewer confirmation.
